name: Chocolate Mint
recipeIngredient: Hot chocolate mix, divided into 6 tablespoons
recipeInstructions:
1. Place peppermint tea bags in the bottom of a pan.
2. Add milk and heat to just under boiling point.
3. Gently squeeze the tea bags and remove them from the pan.
4. Pour 1 cup of hot minted milk into each mug.
5. Add 1 tablespoon of chocolate mix to each mug.
6. Serve with fresh mint leaf or peppermint candy on the side.
Per serving: 146 calories (24 percent from protein, 46 percent from carbohydrate, 30 percent from fat), 9 grams protein, 17 grams carbohydrate, 5 grams fat, 18 milligrams cholesterol, 158 milligrams sodium.
Exchanges: 1 milk, 1 fat.
Makes 6 servings
